title: Privacy-Preserving Observability and Operational Metrics
objective: Provide actionable health, metrics, tracing, and diagnostic evidence while preventing canonical content, private human state, secrets, or unauthorized context from leaking through telemetry.
exit_criteria: Structured operation, transaction, recovery, and adapter telemetry uses stable identifiers and bounded metadata
Metrics and traces expose no protected content, secrets, or disallowed personal data
Health, saturation, failure, and recovery indicators support explicit TEST service objectives
Telemetry loss, duplication, and correlation mismatch are detectable
Observability cannot mutate canonical state or widen disclosure

evidence.description: Implemented privacy-preserving TEST health, metrics, traces, diagnostics, stable correlation, bounded metadata, integrity findings, and incident reconstruction.
CI passed telemetry privacy, correlation, loss, duplication, tamper, incident reconstruction, and protected-content denial tests.
Runtime Coverage passed every declared Sprint 18 observability path.
Work Control Authority passed before completion promotion.
